home.title: Juliano is a front-end web developer
home.subtitle: I specialize in designing and implementing seamless user interactions on the web, utilizing JavaScript, React, and HTML to create captivating and dynamic digital experiences.
home.quote: “The only way to do great work is to love what you do.”

bio.phrase2: I am a software developer with over <important>7 years of experience</important> and enjoy working with technology.  I <important>like solving problems</important>, working with teams, and learning more to stay updated in the field.
bio.phrase3: I’m always studying to improve my skills and learn new things. During my career, I have worked on projects that needed <important>creative solutions and scalable systems</important>.

contacts.title: Get in touch with me.
contacts.description: I'm interested in freelance job opportunities. However, if you have any other requests or questions, please don't hesitate to contact me.

global.slogan: I create interactions between users and technology!

blog.title: Teaching is learning.
blog.description: Here, you will find articles on the subjects I am studying, mastering, and wish to share with friends, or that are part of my career.

projects.title: Projects and Side Projects
projects.description: In addition to studying, I really enjoy programming and putting into practice what I've learned. Here, you will find a list of projects I've been involved in, personal projects from my GitHub, and some other information.
